steps: Contact Goldman Sachs to request return of USD 2,025.00 overpayment on GOOGL dividend for account 1901234567
Provide documentation showing US-UK treaty rate of 15% should apply, not the 13.5% rate they used
Reference IRS Tax Treaty Tables confirming 15% withholding rate for UK residents on US dividends
If Goldman Sachs disputes, escalate with full treaty documentation and demand written explanation for incorrect rate application
